occurrence_sentence: Quantum machine learning can be more efficient than classic machine learning, at least for certain models that are intrinsically hard to learn using conventional computers, says Samuel Fernández Lorenzo, a quantum algorithm researcher who collaborates with BBVA's [New Digital Businesses area](https://www.bbva.com/ndb/es/).

Quantum machine learning can be more efficient than classic machine learning, at least for certain models that are intrinsically hard to learn using conventional computers, says Samuel Fernández Lorenzo, a quantum algorithm researcher who collaborates with BBVA's [New Digital Businesses area](https://www.bbva.com/ndb/es/).

Quantum machine learning can be more efficient than classic machine learning, at least for certain models that are intrinsically hard to learn using conventional computers, says Samuel Fernández Lorenzo, a quantum algorithm researcher who collaborates with BBVA's [New Digital Businesses area](https://www.bbva.com/ndb/es/).
